title: EU newsletter promotional email assessed against a consent requirement pack

requirement_packs.regulation_name: Synthetic EU Promotional Email Consent Framework

jurisdiction_definitions.EU: Synthetic test jurisdiction; no legal interpretation is implied.

requirements.regulation_name: Synthetic EU Promotional Email Consent Framework
requirements.title: Retain affirmative promotional-email consent and withdrawal evidence
requirements.description: Before promotional email is sent, retain evidence of an affirmative, purpose-specific opt-in and operate an opt-out process that is checked before dispatch.

practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox specific to promotional email
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-CMP-EXPORT-2026-07: consent timestamp and form version retained per contact
practice_records.retention: 24 months after last engagement, subject to approved retention process
practice_records.opt_out_process: One-click unsubscribe in every message; suppression list checked before every send
